articles.title: iOS 27 Beta 2 Adds Inline Replies to RCS Chats
articles.description: Apple's iOS 27 Beta 2 introduces inline replies for RCS chats with Android users, enhancing messaging functionality. Users can now reply directly to specific messages.
articles.impact: This update improves cross-platform messaging efficiency.

articles.title: The Hammerhead Karoo Hits Best Price of the Year
articles.description: The Hammerhead Karoo cycling computer is now available at its lowest price this year during Amazon Prime Day. It features an impressive touchscreen for navigation.
articles.impact: Cyclists can save significantly on this device.

articles.title: Clip-On Frames for Smart Glasses Are Here
articles.description: Smart glasses are becoming mainstream, prompting new accessories like clip-on frames from Lorika for Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses. This innovation enhances personalization options.
articles.impact: This trend boosts the smart glasses market appeal.
